task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "Open WeChat app and navigate to the target article"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "Copy the article link using the 'Copy Link' option"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "Test the copied link by pasting it into a message within WeChat"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "Test the copied link by pasting it into an external note app"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "Check if the link uses internal protocols (e.g., weixin://)"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "Save the article directly in WeChat using the 'Save as PDF' option"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "Take screenshots of the article content"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "Use third-party tools like SingleFile or Webpage to PDF converters for public links"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "Archive the page using archive.today for permanent storage"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "Use screen recording or screenshot tools for internal WeChat links"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "copyLink"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "testLinkInWeChat"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node4", "type": "testLinkExternally"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "checkProtocol"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node6", "type": "saveArticle"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node7", "type": "captureScreenshots"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node8", "type": "useThirdPartyTools"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node9", "type": "archivePage"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node10", "type": "useScreenRecording"}]}
